templates.body:
Hi [name],

[deliverable] is ready. [pickup window / ship date].

Please reply RECEIVED when in hand or note any issue same day.

HANDOFF
- Files: [links or pickup location]
- Care: [instructions]
- Warranty: [if any]
- Questions: reply on this thread

Hi [name],

Shipped today via [carrier]. Tracking: [number].
Expected: [date].

Inspect on arrival; report damage within 24h.

INSTALL DAY
[ ] Site access confirmed
[ ] Tools on truck
[ ] Sign-off sheet printed
[ ] Photo before/after
[ ] Client POC on site: [name]

Hi [name],

Final files: [link]
Formats: [list]
Usage: [print/web/license notes]

Download by [date]; link expires [date].

Hi [name],

Sorry something missed the mark: [issue].

Today I will: [fix plan] by [date].
Confirm this works or call [phone].

Hi [name],

Work is complete and held at shop until balance $[amount] clears.
Pay: [link or method]

Happy to release same day payment posts.
We can add [extra] as a change order. I will send updated price before any extra work. Original delivery stays as quoted until you approve.
